allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''MC:'', d.get\(''id'',''?''\), ''inherits:'', d.get\(''inheritsFrom'',''?''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\(''Pillow OK''\)")

Bash(xargs -I{} python3 -c "import zipfile, sys; [print\(n\) for n in zipfile.ZipFile\(''{}''\).namelist\(\) if ''Arrow'' in n and ''renderer'' in n.lower\(\) or ''state'' in n.lower\(\) and ''Arrow'' in n]")

Bash(xargs -I{} python3 -c " import zipfile, sys jar = ''{}'' with zipfile.ZipFile\(jar\) as z: with z.open\(''net/minecraft/client/renderer/entity/ArrowRenderer.class''\) as f: data = f.read\(\) # Extract string constants \(class/method names\) import re strings = re.findall\(b''[\\x20-\\x7e]{4,}'', data\) for s in strings: print\(s.decode\(''ascii'', errors=''ignore''\)\) ")

Bash(xargs -I{} python3 -c " import zipfile with zipfile.ZipFile\(''{}''\) as z: matches = [n for n in z.namelist\(\) if ''UseAnim'' in n or ''ItemUseAnim'' in n or ''Animation'' in n.split\(''/''\)[-1]] for m in matches[:20]: print\(m\) ")

Bash(xargs -I{} python3 -c " import zipfile with zipfile.ZipFile\(''{}''\) as z: matches = [n for n in z.namelist\(\) if \(''UseAnim'' in n or ''ItemAnim'' in n or ''UseAnimation'' in n\) and n.endswith\(''.class''\)] for m in matches[:20]: print\(m\) " find "c:/Users/Koon/.gradle" -name "minecraft-1.21.11*.jar" -not -name "*sources*")
